title: §229.  Repealed by Acts 2015, No. 355, §2. eff. March 14, 2016.
doc_html:
§229. Repealed by Acts 2015, No. 355, §2. eff. March 14, 2016.

            Added by Acts 1974, No. 334, §1; Acts 1997, No. 1028, §1, eff. July 11, 1997; Acts 1999, No. 654, §1, eff. July 1, 1999; Acts 2001, No. 1032, §16; Acts 2003, No. 741, §1; Acts 2004, No. 171, §1, eff. June 10, 2004; Acts 2013, No. 109, §1; Acts 2015, No. 355, §2, eff. March 14, 2016.
